title: Junior Revenue Manager at Elior India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Elior India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Elior India International Enterprises in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Elior India International Enterprises:
Elior India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India International Enterprises!
